workflow_description: Guided installation and configuration of the Google AntiGravity IDE on macOS.
task_summary: Download, install, launch, and authenticate Google AntiGravity.
overview_description: This workflow guides you through the complete setup of Google AntiGravity, the world's first agent-first IDE. You will learn how to download the correct version for your hardware, deploy it to your Applications folder, and configure safety policies for your AI agents.
ui_instructions: Step 1: Download the macOS installer from antigravity.google/download.
Step 2: Drag the AntiGravity icon into your Applications folder.
Step 3: Launch the app and click Next on the Welcome screen.
Step 4: Select 'Review-driven development' as your agent policy.
Step 5: Sign in with your Google Account and verify with 'agy --version'.

carousel_items.caption: Task 1, Step 1: Visit the official download page and select your Mac architecture.
Task 2, Step 1: Drag the AntiGravity application into the Applications folder alias.
Task 3, Step 1: Welcome to AntiGravity. Click Next to begin configuration.
Task 3, Step 2: Choose 'Review-driven development' for optimal agent safety.

chatbot_prompt_context: Help the user with questions about Google AntiGravity installation on macOS. Reference the provided YouTube playlist for visual tutorials and Codelabs for deep dives.
